notes: Post-repair recheck pins 151 unique current food and nonalcoholic products across the owner-linked main, kids, June brunch, May dessert, July King Farm Express lunch, May happy-hour, May drinks, current specials, and linked Toast surfaces.
All 106 frozen rows reconcile exactly once: 94 exact matches, two normalized matches, three artifacts, and seven stale extras; all 55 previously omitted current products are restored.

The corrected catalog contains exactly 109 restaurant-issued ingredient-positive rows, four restaurant-linked product-disclosure rows, one restaurant-linked menu-ingredient row, and 37 unavailable rows, with zero may-contain rows.

Frozen allergen outcomes finish at 30 verified, 18 accurately unavailable, 48 corrected mismatches, and 10 not applicable; linked positives remain vendor provenance and silence is never negative evidence.

The hash-pinned service-aware rebuild removes concatenation artifacts, consolidates duplicate families, excludes stale specials, normalizes the current soup and strawberry-sundae presentations, and preserves materially different service formulations.
The six 404 legacy HTML routes and two superseded lunch PDFs are excluded in favor of the current homepage-linked sources.

findings.summary: Three frozen rows concatenate separately orderable products, modifier choices, or headings and are not current products.
findings.resolution: Removed all three non-product concatenation or modifier artifacts from the canonical catalog.

findings.summary: Seven frozen rows are stale extras: five duplicate representations of retained current products and two dated specials absent from the current owner-linked boundary.
findings.resolution: Consolidated the five duplicate frozen presentations and removed the two superseded specials while retaining their current canonical families where applicable.

findings.summary: The frozen output represents only 96 of 151 current products and omits 55 products across the current brunch, express-lunch, dessert, happy-hour, drinks, kids, main, and dated-special surfaces.
findings.resolution: Restored all 55 omitted products and pinned the complete 151-product current service boundary.

findings.summary: Forty-eight reconciled frozen rows have direct allergen arrays or provenance inconsistent with the current source-specific narrow-positive semantics.
findings.resolution: Corrected all 48 allergen or provenance mismatches while preserving direct positive evidence and leaving unsupported direct and cross-contact status unavailable.

findings.summary: Four product-disclosure rows and one ingredient-positive formulation depend on restaurant-linked Toast evidence and must not be promoted into the 109 restaurant-issued ingredient rows; neither source family supports negative or cross-contact claims.
findings.resolution: Pinned the exact 109 owner-issued, four linked-product, one linked-menu ingredient, and 37 unavailable split with zero invented negatives or may-contain claims.

findings.summary: Six configured legacy HTML menu routes return HTTP 404, and two configured older lunch PDFs are superseded by the owner-linked July King Farm Express menu.
findings.resolution: Replaced the stale configured routes with the current homepage-linked service menu set and July Express lunch source.

repairs.summary: Verified the 151-product current boundary, complete frozen reconciliation, exact owner-versus-linked authority split, removed artifacts and stale extras, and empty cross-contact semantics.
verificationCommands: node --test --test-name-pattern="AYŞE preserves the full current service boundary and narrow source authority" scripts/restaurant-pipeline.test.mjs

notes: Generated counts: 151 total; 109 official ingredients; four restaurant-linked product disclosures; one restaurant-linked menu ingredient; 37 unavailable; zero may-contain.
